description: Milestone 3C: Discourse User API Key Authentication. Implement the same authentication flow used by the official Discourse mobile app - generate RSA key pair, request User API Key via web auth, store encrypted key in Keychain, and use User-Api-Key header for all Discourse API calls.

userStories.title: Generate and store RSA key pair for Discourse auth
userStories.description: Create RSA key pair for encrypting the User API Key exchange. Store keys securely in Keychain.
acceptanceCriteria: RSAKeyManager class generates 2048-bit RSA key pair using Security framework
Public key is exportable in PEM format for sending to Discourse
Private key is stored in Keychain with appropriate access control
Key pair is generated once and reused for subsequent auth attempts
Context7 consulted for iOS Security framework RSA key generation; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Build Discourse User API Key auth URL
userStories.description: Construct the authentication URL for /user-api-key/new endpoint with all required parameters.
acceptanceCriteria: DiscourseAuthManager builds URL with parameters: client_id, nonce, auth_redirect, application_name, public_key, scopes, discourse_app
Scopes limited to minimum needed: notifications, session_info (no write scopes initially)
Nonce is cryptographically random and stored for verification
auth_redirect uses custom URL scheme (piraten://discourse-auth)
Context7 consulted for Discourse User API Key endpoint parameters; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Implement web-based auth flow with ASWebAuthenticationSession
userStories.description: Open Discourse auth page in system browser, handle SSO login, receive callback with encrypted payload.
acceptanceCriteria: ASWebAuthenticationSession opens /user-api-key/new URL
User completes SSO login via Piratenlogin in the web view
Callback URL (piraten://discourse-auth) is intercepted and parsed
Encrypted payload extracted from callback URL parameters
Info.plist configured with custom URL scheme piraten://
Context7 consulted for ASWebAuthenticationSession callback handling; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Decrypt and store User API Key
userStories.description: Use RSA private key to decrypt the payload and extract the User API Key. Store securely.
acceptanceCriteria: Payload decrypted using RSA private key from Keychain
User API Key extracted from decrypted JSON response
Nonce verified to match the one sent in auth request
User API Key stored in Keychain via existing CredentialStore protocol
DiscourseCredential model created for storing key + metadata
Context7 consulted for iOS Security framework RSA decryption; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Modify HTTP client to use User-Api-Key header for Discourse
userStories.description: Replace Bearer token with User-Api-Key header for all Discourse API requests.
acceptanceCriteria: DiscourseHTTPClient uses 'User-Api-Key' header instead of 'Authorization: Bearer'
Token provider abstraction updated to support both SSO tokens and User API Keys
Existing DiscourseAPIClient works without modification (header change is transparent)
ForumView and MessagesView display content after successful auth
Context7 consulted for HTTP header best practices; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Integrate Discourse auth with app auth state
userStories.description: Coordinate Discourse auth flow with existing Keycloak SSO auth state management.
acceptanceCriteria: After Keycloak login succeeds, Discourse auth is triggered if no User API Key exists
Auth state reflects both SSO state and Discourse connection state
User sees clear progress indicators during two-step auth
If Discourse auth fails, user can retry without re-doing SSO login
Logout clears both Keycloak tokens and Discourse User API Key
Context7 consulted for multi-service auth state patterns; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Document Discourse auth architecture
userStories.description: Update documentation with the new auth flow and security considerations.
acceptanceCriteria: DECISIONS.md updated with D-011 explaining User API Key choice over Bearer passthrough
THREAT_MODEL.md updated with RSA key storage and API key security considerations
OPEN_QUESTIONS.md Q-002 marked as resolved
README.md updated with auth flow overview
Context7 consulted for security documentation best practices; summary added to progress.txt
